testcase.name: test_08_passenger_initiate_payment
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_e2e_payment_flow.py:250: in test_08_passenger_initiate_payment assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to create payment intent: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create payment intent: {"detail":"Erreur de paiement: Invalid API Key provided: sk_test_****gent"} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_full_e2e_flow
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_e2e_payment_flow.py:313: in test_full_e2e_flow payment_data = self.test_08_passenger_initiate_payment(ride_id, passenger_token) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_e2e_payment_flow.py:250: in test_08_passenger_initiate_payment assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to create payment intent: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create payment intent: {"detail":"Erreur de paiement: Invalid API Key provided: sk_test_****gent"} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
